subcodes.first_line: O sorely tried friends of ‘Abdu’l-Baha! It hath become apparent that a wicked person in those regions hath assailed and attacked both rich and poor
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران ممتحن عبدالبهاء از قرار معلوم شخصی شریر شهیر در آنصفحات بر غنی و
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort
